response_body.response:
here's your skincare routine for texture:

the 'am | pm' cell shows up cleanly in the table. you can adapt the routine to your specific products once you grab one of the recommended exfoliants above.

products.name: The Ordinary Glycolic Acid 7% Toning Solution
products.description: 7% glycolic AHA toner — start 2x/week, do not combine with retinol.

products.name: The Ordinary Lactic Acid 10% + HA
products.description: Mild AHA — for those who can't tolerate glycolic.

products.name: Paula's Choice Resist Daily Smoothing Treatment 5% AHA
products.description: 5% mandelic + lactic AHA — gentler entry exfoliant for darker skin tones.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.
